slides.heading: Abazingeli-Baqoqi Nabelusi eNingizimu Afrika
slides.lead: Hlangana namaSan namaKhoikhoi - abantu bokuqala ababehlala eNingizimu Afrika - futhi uthole ukuthi ukugcina izilwane kwayishintsha kanjani indlela abantu ababephila ngayo.

image.alt: Indawo eyomile yaseNingizimu Afrika enegquma elinamadwala, inyamazane, nelanga.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='258' cy='46' r='24' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect y='118' width='320' height='62' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M0 118 L60 96 L110 114 L168 86 L232 110 L320 92 L320 118 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><path d='M40 96 L70 60 L100 96 Z' fill='#9a7b53'/><g fill='#5c4327'><rect x='150' y='120' width='4' height='16'/><rect x='170' y='120' width='4' height='16'/><path d='M146 108 q12 -10 30 0 l0 14 -30 0 Z'/><path d='M146 108 l-8 -8 4 -1 6 6 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Yamukela abafundi endabeni yabantu bokuqala eNingizimu Afrika. Chaza amaqembu amabili amakhulu abazohlangana nawo: amaSan, okwakungabazingeli-baqoqi, namaKhoikhoi, okwakungabelusi. Babuze ukuthi bacabanga ukuthi 'umzingeli-mqoqi' kanye 'nomelusi' kusho ukuthini ngaphambi kokuqala. [SME] Izinsuku zalezi zizwe zinikezwa njengezilinganiselo ezilula ezifanele iBanga 5.

slides.heading: Ngobani ababehlala lapha kuqala?
slides.lead: AmaSan kwakungabantu bokuqala ababehlala eNingizimu Afrika, eminyakeni eyizinkulungwane eminingi eyedlule.

blocks.text: **AmaSan** kwakungabantu bokuqala eNingizimu Afrika. Babehlala lapha kudlulele phambi kwamadolobha, amapulazi noma ukubhala. Lesi sikhathi sibizwa nge**Later Stone Age** (iNkathi Yamuva Yamatshe), ngoba abantu babenza amathuluzi abo ngamatshe, ngokhuni nangamathambo.

items: AmaSan awazange akhe amadolobha ahlala njalo - ayehamba ehla enyuka esuka kwenye indawo eya kwenye.
Ayephila ngomhlaba **ngokuzingela** izilwane no**kuqoqa** izitshalo zasendle.
Muva kakhulu, elinye iqembu elibizwa ngamaKhoikhoi lafika nezilwane zokwelusa.

slides.notes: Beka isimo ngomqondo wesikhathi eside kakhulu. Abafundi beBanga 5 kubalukhuni ukucabanga 'eminyakeni eyizinkulungwane eyedlule', ngakho kuqhathanise nokhokho abaningi kakhulu abedlule. Yethula igama elithi 'umhambuma' (ohamba ehla enyuka) elivela futhi. Chaza ukuthi sifunda ngalaba bantu ezintweni abazishiya emuva, njengamathuluzi nemidwebo yasematsheni.

slides.heading: AmaSan: abazingeli nabaqoqi
slides.lead: AmaSan ayethola konke ayekudinga emhlabeni wemvelo owawuwazungezile.

blocks.text: AmaSan ayephila **ngokuzingela** izilwane zasendle njengegemsbok nezinye izinyamazane, kanye **nokuqoqa** izitshalo zasendle, izimpande, izithelo noju. Ngenxa yokuthi ayelandela izilwane nezinkathi zonyaka, ayehamba esuka kwenye indawo eya kwenye. Le ndlela yokuphila siyibiza ngokuthi indlela **yobuhambuma**.

items: **Amadoda** ngokuvamile yiwo ayezingela.
**Abesifazane** babeqoqa izitshalo bembe izimpande zokudla.
Ayethatha kuphela lokho ayekudinga, ukuze umhlaba ukwazi ukuvuselela.

image.alt: Umfanekiso womzingeli onomcibisholo eceleni kowesifazane ophethe induku yokumba nesitshalo.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><g fill='#7a5a3a'><circle cx='70' cy='44' r='12'/><rect x='63' y='58' width='14' height='46'/><rect x='60' y='104' width='7' height='30'/><rect x='73' y='104' width='7' height='30'/></g><path d='M92 40 q22 34 0 68' fill='none' stroke='#5c4327' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='92' y1='40' x2='92' y2='108' stroke='#5c4327' stroke-width='2'/><g fill='#2f5233'><circle cx='160' cy='44' r='12'/><rect x='153' y='58' width='14' height='46'/><rect x='150' y='104' width='7' height='30'/><rect x='163' y='104' width='7' height='30'/></g><line x1='178' y1='40' x2='178' y2='120' stroke='#5c4327' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='188' cy='70' r='6' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza umehluko phakathi kokuzingela nokuqoqa, nokuthi kokubili kwakudingeka ukuze baphile - ukuqoqa izitshalo ngokuvamile kwakunikeza ukudla okuthembeke kakhulu. Qaphela ukwabelana ngemisebenzi phakathi kwamadoda nabesifazane ngaphandle kokukwahlulela ngemibono yanamuhla. Qinisa inhlonipho amaSan ayenayo ngemvelo: ayewusebenzisa umhlaba ngokucophelela ukuze ungapheli.

slides.heading: Umcibisholo nomcibisholo onobuthi
slides.lead: AmaSan asungula indlela ehlakaniphile yokuzingela izilwane ezinkulu kunawo.

blocks.text: AmaSan enza **umnsalo nemicibisholo** emincane. Ayefaka **ubuthi** ezihlokweni zemicibisholo. Ngemva kokudubula isilwane, ayeslandela buthule izinyathelo zaso - kwesinye isikhathi izinsuku - kuze kube yilapho ubuthi busenza sibuthaka ngokwanele ukuze sibanjwe. Amakhono amahle okulandela izinyathelo ayebaluleke kakhulu.

items: Ubuthi babuvela ezitshalweni, ezinyokeni noma emabhungwini ezimbungulu.
Abazingeli kwakumele basondele kakhulu badubule kanye kuphela.
Babefunda izinyathelo esihlabathini ukuze balandele isilwane.

image.alt: Umnsalo onomcibisholo, nomugqa wezinyathelo zesilwane esihlabathini.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M50 30 q40 50 0 100' fill='none' stroke='#5c4327' stroke-width='4'/><line x1='50' y1='30' x2='50' y2='130' stroke='#8a7050' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='42' y1='80' x2='150' y2='80' stroke='#5c4327' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M150 80 l-12 -6 0 12 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><g fill='#9a7b53'><ellipse cx='120' cy='120' rx='5' ry='7'/><ellipse cx='140' cy='128' rx='5' ry='7'/><ellipse cx='162' cy='120' rx='5' ry='7'/><ellipse cx='184' cy='128' rx='5' ry='7'/><ellipse cx='206' cy='120' rx='5' ry='7'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Lesi sithombe sikhombisa ikhono nolwazi lwamaSan, hhayi ukuphila nje. Gcizelela isineke nokuqonda okujulile kwemvelo okwakudinga ukulandela isilwane izinsuku nokwazi ukuthi yiziphi izitshalo ezenza ubuthi. Phatha 'ubuthi' ngokusobala nangokweqiniso - kwakuyithuluzi lokuthola ukudla, hhayi elokulimaza abantu. Buza abafundi ukuthi kungani ukudubula kanye kuphela kwakubalulekile (ukuhlala ufihlekile, ukonga imicibisholo).

slides.heading: Amathuluzi amaSan nezinto zansuku zonke
slides.lead: AmaSan ayenza yonke into ayenayo ngalokho ayekuthola akuzungeze.

blocks.heading: Izinti zomlilo
blocks.text: Izinti ezimbili ezihlikihlwana ukwenza inhlansi. Umlilo wawunikeza ukufudumala, ukukhanya nokudla okuphekiwe.

blocks.heading: Igobolondo leqanda lentshe
blocks.text: Iqanda lentshe elingenalutho lalisetshenziswa ukuthwala nokugcina amanzi, ligqitshwe emhlabathini ukuze ahlale epholile.

blocks.heading: Induku yokumba
blocks.text: Induku ecijile eyayisetshenziswa ukumba izimpande nezinsamba zokudla.

blocks.heading: Ikaross
blocks.text: Ijazi lesikhumba elenziwe ngesikhumba sesilwane, elaligqokelwa ukufudumala nokuthwala izinto.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa lezi zinto ezine ukwenza impilo yamaSan ibonakale. Veza ukuthi yonke into yayilula futhi ikwazi ukuthwalwa, ngoba amaSan ayehamba njalo. Ubuhlalu namagobolondo eqanda lentshe nawo ayesetshenziswa ukuhlobisa futhi anikezwa njengezipho ukwakha ubungani phakathi kwamaqembu. Mema abafundi bacabange ukuba nezinto kuphela abangazithwala.

slides.heading: AmaSan ayabelana ngakho konke
slides.lead: AmaSan ayephila emaqenjini amancane lapho wonke umuntu ayelingana khona.

blocks.text: AmaSan ayephila ema**qenjini** amancane abantu abangaba ngu-15 kuya ku-40, imvamisa imindeni embalwa ndawonye. Ayenga**nazinduna** futhi kwakungekho muntu owayecebile noma obaluleke kunabanye. Ayeka **abelana** ngokudla asizana. Ayekholelwa ukuthi akekho umuntu ongaba nomhlaba - wawungowabo bonke ukuze uwusebenzise.

items: Abesifazane babengakha indlu yotshani ngaphansi kwehora.
Izingane zazifunda ngokudlala nangokulingisa abazali bazo.
Ukwabelana kwakusho ukuthi akekho owayelamba kanti abanye banokudla.

image.alt: Indlu yotshani emise okwenqhumbi eceleni komlilo omncane.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='120' width='240' height='40' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M40 122 a54 54 0 0 1 108 0 Z' fill='#9a8a5c'/><path d='M52 122 a42 42 0 0 1 84 0' fill='none' stroke='#7a6a3c' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M70 122 a26 26 0 0 1 48 0' fill='#5c4a24'/><g><path d='M186 122 l-8 -22 16 0 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><path d='M186 122 l-14 -14 8 -4 Z' fill='#c8611f'/><path d='M186 122 l14 -14 -8 -4 Z' fill='#c8611f'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Le yindawo enhle yokukhuluma ngobulungiswa nomphakathi. Qhathanisa kancane nomhlaba wanamuhla lapho abantu benezinto zabo. Chaza ukuthi ukuba 'ngenazinduna' kwakungasho ukuthi kwakungekho mithetho - iqembu lalithatha izinqumo ndawonye futhi abadala babehlonishwa. Gcina isimo senhlonipho ugweme ukwenza impilo yamaSan ibonakale 'ilula' noma 'ithuthuke kancane'; yayifanele kahle umhlaba wawo.

slides.heading: Imidwebo yasematsheni yamaSan
slides.lead: AmaSan adweba futhi aqopha izinkulungwane zezithombe ematsheni nasezindongeni zemihume.

blocks.text: **Imidwebo yasematsheni** isho izithombe ezidwetshwe noma eziqoshwe etsheni. INingizimu Afrika inemidwebo yasematsheni emihle kakhulu emhlabeni, futhi eyiningi yayo yenziwa ngamaSan. Ayedweba abantu nezilwane njengempofu (eland), esebenzisa upende owenziwe ngemibala yemvelo. Eminye imidwebo e**uKhahlamba Drakensberg** ineminyaka engaba ngu-3 000 ubudala.

items: Upende wawenziwa ngezinto ezifana netshe elibomvu neliphuzi, amalahle negazi.
**Impofu (eland)**, inyamazane enkulu, yayidwetshwa ukwedlula noma yisiphi esinye isilwane.
Imidwebo yasematsheni isisiza ukufunda ukuthi amaSan ayephila kanjani nokuthi ayekholelwa kuni.

image.alt: Udonga lomhume olunemidwebo ebomvu enjengeyamaSan yempofu nabantu abagijimayo.

slides.notes: Gcizelela ukuthi imidwebo yasematsheni iwumlando wangempela owashiywa ngamaSan ngokwawo - uxhumano nesikhathi esidlule. Sho ukubaluleka okukhethekile kwempofu (eland). I-Linton Panel edumile (manje esemnyuziyamu) yaze yagqugquzela ingxenye yesibonakaliso sombuso saseNingizimu Afrika. [SME] Ubudala obuqondile bemidwebo yasematsheni buyahluka ngokwendawo; iminyaka engu-3 000 yiwo umumo oqinisekisiwe iSAHO ewunikeza ngeDrakensberg, kodwa eminye imidwebo mincane futhi embalwa indala - qinisekisa amagama nge-SME.

slides.heading: Kungani amaSan ayedweba?
slides.lead: Imidwebo yasematsheni yayibalulekile ezinkolelweni zamaSan, hhayi ukuhlobisa kuphela.

blocks.text: Ngeke siqiniseke ngokuphelele ukuthi kungani amaSan ayedweba, kodwa iningi lochwepheshe likholelwa ukuthi izithombe zaziyingxenye **yezinkolelo nempilo yawo yakomoya**. Abantu abakhethekile ababizwa ngabelaphi babebamba imidanso ukusiza umphakathi wabo, futhi eminye imidwebo ingabe ikhombisa lokho ababekuzwa nababekubona. Umsebenzi wobuciko futhi usitshela ngezilwane nempilo amaSan ayeyazi kahle.

items: Eminye imidwebo ingabe ixhumene nemidanso yokwelapha namaphupho.
Eminye ingenzeka yenziwa ukuletha inhlanhla enhle yokuzingela.
Namuhla imidwebo yasematsheni ivikelekile njengengxenye yamagugu eNingizimu Afrika.

slides.notes: Yethula incazelo yakomoya yemidwebo yasematsheni ngenhlonipho nangokulula. Yenza kucace kubafundi ukuthi lokhu yilokho iningi lochwepheshe likucabangayo, hhayi iqiniso eliqinisekisiwe - abezomlando basebenzisa amacashazi ukwenza ukuqagela ngokucophelela. Gwema ulimi oluvusa amadlingozi ngokuthi 'ulwabhoco/trance' kubafundi beBanga 5; 'imidanso yokwelapha' 'namaphupho' yizindlela ezithobekile eziqinisile. Gcizelela ukuthi ukulimaza imidwebo yasematsheni kuphambene nomthetho ngoba ingeyabo bonke. [SME] Incazelo ye-shamanistic/trance iwumbono ohamba phambili wezifundiswa kodwa uyaphikiswana - ugcine ubekwe njengokuthi 'iningi lochwepheshe likholelwa'.

slides.heading: Abelusi bamaKhoikhoi bayafika
slides.lead: Cishe eminyakeni engu-2 000 eyedlule iqembu elisha lafika nezilwane eNingizimu Afrika.

blocks.text: **AmaKhoikhoi** angena eNingizimu Afrika evela phezulu enyakatho cishe **eminyakeni engu-2 000 eyedlule**. Igama elithi *Khoikhoi* lisho 'abantu bangempela'. Ayengabe**lusi**, abuye abizwe ngokuthi **ama-pastoralists**, ngoba ayegcina anakekela izilwane. Le kwakuyindlela entsha yokuphila amaSan ayengakayiboni.

items: Abelusi bagcina izilwane ezi**thanjisiwe** (ezifuywayo) esikhundleni sokuzingela kuphela.
NjengamaSan, amaKhoikhoi ayengabahambuma futhi ayehamba efuna amadlelo.
Ayegcina izimvu, izimbuzi nezinkomo.

image.alt: Umfanekiso womelusi onenduku ehamba eceleni kwezinkomo nezimvu.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='122' width='240' height='38' fill='#7a8b5a'/><g fill='#5c4327'><circle cx='40' cy='52' r='11'/><rect x='34' y='64' width='12' height='40'/><rect x='31' y='104' width='6' height='24'/><rect x='43' y='104' width='6' height='24'/></g><line x1='52' y1='44' x2='52' y2='120' stroke='#8a7050' stroke-width='3'/><g fill='#8a6a44'><ellipse cx='120' cy='96' rx='26' ry='16'/><rect x='100' y='104' width='5' height='18'/><rect x='134' y='104' width='5' height='18'/><path d='M96 90 l-8 -6 8 0 Z'/></g><g fill='#e8e2d2'><ellipse cx='190' cy='104' rx='18' ry='12'/><rect x='178' y='112' width='4' height='12'/><rect x='198' y='112' width='4' height='12'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Yethula ushintsho olukhulu lwale yunithi: ukwelusa. Chaza 'ukuthanjiswa/ukufuywa' ngezibonelo zansuku zonke (inja ethanjisiwe noma inkomo yasepulazini uma kuqhathaniswa nesilwane sasendle). Qaphela ukuthi amaKhoikhoi ayelokhu ezingela eqoqa nawo, kodwa ukugcina izilwane kwakuwumehluko omusha nobalulekile. [SME] Umsuka nosuku oluqondile lokwelusa/lokufika kwamaKhoikhoi eNingizimu Afrika kuyaphikiswana ngabavubukuli; 'eminyakeni engu-2 000 eyedlule' kulandela izinto zeSAHO zeBanga 5 futhi kuwukwenza kube lula.

slides.heading: Impilo enemihlambi yezilwane
slides.lead: Impilo yonke yamaKhoikhoi yayakhelwe phezu kwezilwane zawo.

blocks.text: AmaKhoikhoi ayehamba nemihlambi yawo efuna utshani obusha namanzi. Izindlu zawo, ezibizwa nge**matjieshuise**, zazenziwe ngamacansi omhlanga phezu kwezigxobo ezincane ukuze zikwazi ukudilizwa zithwalwe emhlane wezilwane. **Izinkomo** zaziyigugu kakhulu. Abesifazane babesenga izilwane amadoda alokhu ezingela inyama.

items: Izindlu nezimbiza kwakwenziwa kube lula ukuze kube lula ukukuhambisa.
Ngokuvamile babephuza **ubisi** esikhundleni sokubulala izinkomo zabo.
Izinkomo zazidliwa kuphela ngezikhathi ezikhethekile, njengemishado nemingcwabo.

image.alt: Indlu emise okwenqhumbi eyenziwe ngecansi lomhlanga eceleni kwenkomo.
image.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='122' width='240' height='38' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M30 122 a52 52 0 0 1 104 0 Z' fill='#cdae74'/><path d='M46 122 a36 36 0 0 1 72 0' fill='none' stroke='#a88a4c' stroke-width='2'/><path d='M64 122 a18 18 0 0 1 36 0' fill='#8a6a3c'/><line x1='30' y1='108' x2='134' y2='108' stroke='#a88a4c' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='40' y1='92' x2='124' y2='92' stroke='#a88a4c' stroke-width='1.5'/><g fill='#7a5a3a'><ellipse cx='188' cy='96' rx='26' ry='16'/><rect x='168' y='104' width='5' height='18'/><rect x='202' y='104' width='5' height='18'/><path d='M164 90 l-8 -6 8 0 Z'/><path d='M162 84 l-4 -8 6 4 Z'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Chaza ubuhlakani obusebenzayo bematjieshuis - ikhaya ongalipakisha ulithwale. Umqondo osemqoka ukuthi izinkomo zazigcinwa ziphila ngenxa yobisi nanjengengcebo, hhayi ikakhulukazi ngenxa yenyama. Lo mehluko omkhulu kumaSan, ayedla izilwane ayezizingela. Yethula igama elithi 'matjieshuis' ngokuthobekile; ukubizwa kwalo cishe kunjenge 'matchie-hoyse'.

slides.heading: Ukwelusa kwawushintsha kanjani umphakathi
slides.lead: Ukuba nezilwane kwenza umphakathi wamaKhoikhoi wehluke kuwo wamaSan.

items: Babelana ngakho konke ngokulinganayo.
Ayenganazinduna; wonke umuntu wayelingana.
Kwakungekho muntu owayenomhlaba.
Ayethola ukudla ngokuzingela nokuqoqa.
Izilwane zaziy**cebe** ngumuntu othile.
Abanye abantu baba **abacebile** abanye baba abampofu.
Abantu abacebile babe **nokubaluleka** namandla amaningi.
Ayethola ukudla ikakhulukazi emihlanjini yawo.

slides.notes: Lokhu kuyinhliziyo yombuzo weCAPS othi 'ukwelusa kwayishintsha kanjani imiphakathi'. Umqondo omkhulu: ngenxa yokuthi izilwane zaziyoceba, ingcebo yavela, kanti ngengcebo kwafika umehluko wokubaluleka nezinsuku zokuqala zabaholi. Veza ukuthi lokhu akusiko 'okungcono' noma 'okubi' - indlela nje ehlukile yokuphila eyakhula ekugcineni izilwane. Yenza abafundi bakhombe umehluko owodwa kukolomu ngamunye.

slides.heading: Ukwabelana ngomhlaba ofanayo
slides.lead: AmaSan namaKhoikhoi ayephila eduze, okwakwesinye isikhathi kubangela ukungqubuzana.

blocks.text: AmaSan namaKhoikhoi ayephila ezindaweni ezifanayo. Izinkomo nezimvu zamaKhoikhoi zazidla utshani obuningi, futhi lokhu kwaxosha izilwane zasendle amaSan ayezizingela. Uma amaSan elamba, ngezinye izikhathi ayethatha izilwane zamaKhoikhoi ukuze adle. Lokhu kwaholela empini phakathi kwamaqembu amabili. Kodwa kwakukhona futhi **ukuhwebelana** no**bungani**, futhi amanye amaSan azihlanganisa namaqembu amaKhoikhoi.

items: Imihlambi yayidla utshani, ngakho izilwane zasendle zasuka.
Amaqembu amabili ayehwebelana futhi elwa wodwa.
Ndawonye kwesinye isikhathi abizwa ngamaKhoisan.

slides.notes: Nikeza isithombe esilinganiselayo: ubudlelwano babungebona ukungqubuzana kuphela. Kwakukhona ukuhwebelana, ukushadelana nokubambisana kanye nokulwa ngezinsiza. Chaza igama elihlanganisiwe elithi 'Khoisan'. Lesi sithombe futhi silungiselela kancane umlando wakamuva (ukufika kwamaDashi ngo-1652), abafundi abazohlangana nawo ngokuningiliziwe emabangeni akamuva. Gcina isimo siyiqiniso ugweme ukubukisa elinye iqembu 'njengelibi'.

slides.heading: Indaba ende kakhulu

blocks.alt: Umugqa wesikhathi kusukela kubazingeli-baqoqi bamaSan bokuqala kuya ekufikeni kwabelusi bamaKhoikhoi.

events.label: Abazingeli-baqoqi bamaSan bahlala kuyo yonke iNingizimu Afrika
AmaSan namaKhoikhoi ayehwebelana, abelana ngomhlaba futhi kwesinye isikhathi alwa

slides.notes: Sebenzisa lokhu ukusiza abafundi bahlele indaba ngokulandelana: abazingeli-baqoqi kuqala, abelusi kamuva. Bakhumbuze ukuthi lezi yizinsuku ezilinganiselwayo, hhayi eziqondile - abezomlando basebenzisa u-'cishe' uma bengaqiniseki. [SME] Zonke izinsuku ezine lapha ziyilinganiselo futhi zenziwe zaba lula zeBanga 5; qinisekisa umumo nge-SME.

slides.heading: Esikufundile
slides.lead: AmaSan ayezingela eqoqa futhi abelana ngakho konke; amaKhoikhoi ayegcina imihlambi, kanti ukuba nezilwane kwashintsha indlela abantu ababephila ngayo.

blocks.text: **AmaSan** kwakungabantu bokuqala eNingizimu Afrika. Ayephila **ngokuzingela nangokuqoqa**, ehamba esuka kwenye indawo eya kwenye, abelana ngakho konke, futhi asishiyela **imidwebo yasematsheni** emihle. **AmaKhoikhoi** kwakunga**belusi** ababegcina izilwane. Ngenxa yokuthi izilwane zaziyoceba, abanye abantu baba abacebile kunabanye - ngakho ukwelusa kwayishintsha indlela umphakathi owawusebenza ngayo.

blocks.question: Sho izindlela ezimbili amaSan ayethola ngazo ukudla kwawo.
Yimuphi umehluko owodwa phakathi komzingeli-mqoqi nomelusi?
Ukugcina izilwane kwawushintsha kanjani umphakathi wamaKhoikhoi? Nikeza isibonelo esisodwa.

slides.notes: Buyekeza izindlela ezimbili zokuphila nomqondo osemqoka woshintsho: ukuba nezilwane kwaholela engcebweni nasemehlukweni phakathi kwabantu. Sebenzisa imibuzo emithathu njengomsebenzi obhaliwe noma ingxoxo yekilasi. Umbuzo 1 uhlola ukukhumbula (ukuzingela, ukuqoqa), umbuzo 2 uhlola ukuqonda izindlela ezimbili zokuphila, kanti umbuzo 3 uqondise kokugxilwa kweCAPS ekutheni ukwelusa kwayishintsha kanjani imiphakathi. Khumbuza abafundi ukuthi imidwebo yasematsheni iwumlando oyigugu okumele siwuvikele.
